ResourcesAllocate.description: Details of the specified node's service resource

ResourceId.description: Specify the service resource for the endpoint connection

ZoneId.description: Availability zone ID of the service resource to be specified

NetworkInterfaceIP.description: The private IPv4 address of the terminal node NIC. If a smooth service resource replacement is in progress, this refers to the IPv4 address of the terminal node NIC connected to the service resource being replaced.

NetworkInterfaceId.description: Endpoint network interface ID. If a seamless service resource replacement is in progress, this indicates the endpoint network interface ID connected to the replaced service resource

NetworkInterfaceIpv6.description: Private IPv6 address of the endpoint network interface. If a seamless service resource replacement is in progress, this indicates the IPv6 address of the endpoint network interface connected to the replaced service resource. If the endpoint only supports IPv4, this parameter is not returned

SubnetId.description: ID of the subnet to which the endpoint network interface belongs

ZoneDomain.description: The domain name of the terminal node availability zone.

ZoneStatus.description: Status of the endpoint zone. PendingAcceptance: waiting for connection. Connecting: connecting. Connected: connected. Disconnecting: disconnecting. Rejected: connection rejected. Failed: connection failed

description: Unidirectional, private network connection established between the endpoint and the endpoint service

Bps.description: Maximum bandwidth for the endpoint connection, range 100–20000 Mbps

ConnectionStatus.description: Status of the endpoint connection. PendingAcceptance: waiting for connection. Connecting: connecting. Connected: connected. Disconnecting: disconnecting. Rejected: connection rejected. Failed: connection failed. PartialFailed: partial connection failure. ServiceDeleted: service deleted

CreationTime.description: Creation time of the endpoint connection

EndpointOwnerAccountId.description: Account ID to which the endpoint belongs

EndpointVpcId.description: ID of the VPC to which the endpoint network interface belongs

ReplacingResource.description: Whether to operate the endpoint connection for seamless service resource replacement. true: yes, disconnect the old service resource for the seamless replacement endpoint connection. false: no, reject the specified endpoint connection. If this parameter is empty, the specified endpoint connection is rejected

UpdateTime.description: Most recent operation time of the endpoint connection
